text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion dominates at the autumn Tenno Sho!
As she runs, she's engulfed in thunderous
applause and cheers of support...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ever-radiant during her run, the victory looks set
to become one that will be spoken of for years to
come.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With this incredible race behind us, Fine Motion
and I happily wonder what to do tomorrow. There
are only a few months left before she goes back
to Ireland... which means there's still time to enjoy
Japan!
